allow: Bash(node -e "const g=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('static/data/graph.json','utf8'\)\); const r=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('static/data/relations.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('nodes total:', g.nodes.length\); console.log\('edges total:', g.edges.length\); console.log\('demo nodes:', g.nodes.filter\(n=>n.include_demo\).length\); console.log\('demo edges:', g.edges.filter\(e=>e.include_demo\).length\); const chains=[...new Set\(g.nodes.map\(n=>n.chain\).filter\(Boolean\)\)]; console.log\('chains:', chains\); const types=[...new Set\(g.nodes.map\(n=>n.source\)\)]; console.log\('sources:', types\);")

Bash(node -e "const g=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('static/data/graph.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(g.edges[0], null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(g.edges[1], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const g=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('static/data/graph.json','utf8'\)\); const withSubtype=g.nodes.filter\(n=>n.subtype\); console.log\('nodes with subtype:', withSubtype.length\); if\(withSubtype.length\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(withSubtype[0], null, 2\)\);")
